channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kalshi cancels planned flight cancellation contracts
item.description: The prediction markets company intended to offer wagers for hedging travel risks, but critics warned of potential misuse.

item.title: Ending US reliance on China would cost nearly $14 trillion, EY warns
item.description: EY-Parthenon partner Mats Persson told Fortune that such investment levels are unattainable.

item.title: Big Tech executives warn enterprises are giving too much to AI labs
item.description: Microsoft's Satya Nadella and Palantir's Alex Karp caution that AI labs are quietly extracting valuable enterprise data.

item.title: Global elites like Peter Thiel seek exit options; Argentina aims to become a top migration destination
item.description: A new citizenship-by-investment program could make Argentina a popular backup plan for wealthy individuals hedging against home risks.
